description: Taiwan introduced a ban on single-use plastic straws in public sector food outlets in 2019, as part of its 'Policy Guidelines for Plastic Reduction', which aimed to eliminate all single-use plastics by 2030.

key_events.description: Environmental Protection Administration announces the timeline.
Pushback from the bubble tea industry regarding technical challenges.
Government provides subsidies for paper and reusable straw manufacturers.
Enforcement begins in public agencies and schools.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling policies that hit specific cultural industries (bubble tea) and require state-led industrial adaptation.
